Form_EditionIdentifier_A.tu: The edition identifier of the form including the form number and edition (the date is typically formatted YYYY/MM).

Producer_CustomerIdentifier_A.tu: Enter identifier: The customer's identification number assigned by the producer (e.g., agency or brokerage).

Form_CompletionDate_A.tu: Enter date: The date on which the form is completed.  (MM/DD/YYYY)

Producer_FullName_A.tu: Enter text: The full name of the producer / agency.

Policy_PolicyNumberIdentifier_A.tu: Enter identifier: The identifier assigned by the insurer to the policy, or submission, being referenced exactly as it appears on the policy, including prefix and suffix symbols.  If required for self-insurance, the self-insured license or contract number.

Policy_EffectiveDate_A.tu: Enter date: The effective date of the policy.  The date that the terms and conditions of the policy commence.  (MM/DD/YYYY)

Insurer_FullName_A.tu: Enter text: The insurer's full legal company name(s) as found in the file copy of the policy.  Use the actual name of the company within the group to which the policy has been issued.  This is not the insurer's group name or trade name.

Insurer_NAICCode_A.tu: Enter code: The identification code assigned to the insurer by the National Association of Insurance Commissioners (NAIC).

NamedInsured_FullName_A.tu: Enter text: The named insured(s) as it / they will appear on the policy declarations page.

Policy_Status_NewIndicator_A.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the response expected from the company is a new issued policy.

Policy_Status_RenewIndicator_A.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the response expected from the company is a renewed policy.

Policy_PolicyType_UmbrellaIndicator_A.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the type of policy is umbrella.

Policy_PolicyType_ExcessIndicator_A.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the type of policy is excess.

ExcessUmbrella_OccurrenceIndicator_A.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates "coverage trigger" is on an occurrence basis on an excess or umbrella liability policy.

ExcessUmbrella_ClaimsMadeIndicator_A.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the "coverage trigger" is on a claims-made basis on an excess or umbrella liability policy.

ExcessUmbrella_VoluntaryIndicator_A.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if the excess is voluntary.

ExcessUmbrella_Transactiontype_OtherIndi.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the transaction type is other than those listed.

ExcessUmbrella_Transactiontype_OtherDesc.tu: Enter text: The description of the other transaction type.

PriorCoverage_PolicyNumberIdentifier_A.tu: Enter identifier: The policy number of the previous coverage.

ExcessUmbrella_ProposedRetroactiveDate_A.tu: Enter date: The retroactive date you are requesting for the policy being applied for. This is the proposed earliest date for which an occurrence could "trigger" coverage under a Claims Made policy.

ExcessUmbrella_CurrentRetroactiveDate_A.tu: Enter date: The current retroactive date should be shown if the Umbrella is over a Claims Made primary policy. If the current retroactive date is different from the proposed retroactive date, an explanation must be provided.

ExcessUmbrella_Umbrella_EachOccurrenceAm.tu: Enter limit: The excess or umbrella liability each occurrence limit.

ExcessUmbrella_Umbrella_AggregateAmount_.tu: Enter limit: The excess or umbrella liability aggregate limit should be listed as whole dollar amount, as governed by the policy.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).

ExcessUmbrella_OtherCoverageLimitAmount_.tu: Enter limit: The excess or umbrella liability other coverage limit should be listed as a whole dollar amount, as governed by the policy.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).

ExcessUmbrella_OtherCoverageDescription_.tu: Enter text: The description of other coverage (not the limit) on the excess or umbrella liability policy.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).

ExcessUmbrella_Umbrella_DeductibleOrRete.tu: Enter deductible: The excess or umbrella liability deductible or retention amount.

ExcessUmbrella_FirstDollarDefenceCode_A.tu: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates that first dollar defense coverage is requested.

ExcessUmbrella_EmployeeBenefits_EachEmpl.tu: Enter limit: The each employee limit for employee benefits coverage.

ExcessUmbrella_EmployeeBenefits_Aggregat.tu: Enter limit: The aggregate limit for employee benefits coverage.

ExcessUmbrella_EmployeeBenefits_Deductib.tu: Enter amount: The retention amount for employee benefits coverage.

ExcessUmbrella_EmployeeBenefits_Retroact.tu: Enter date: The retroactive date for employee benefits coverage.

ExcessUmbrella_EmployeeBenefits_ProgramN.tu: Enter text: The full name of the benefit program.

CommercialStructure_Location_ProducerIde.tu: Enter number: The location number for the premises.

CommercialStructure_Location_FullName_A.tu: Enter text: The name of the location.  For commercial policies, this may be a company name.

CommercialStructure_PhysicalAddress_Line.tu: Enter text: The first address line of the commercial structure.

CommercialStructure_PhysicalAddress_Stat.tu: Enter code: The state or province code of the commercial structure.

CommercialStructure_PhysicalAddress_Post.tu: Enter code: The postal code of the commercial structure.

BusinessInformation_TotalPayrollAmount_A.tu: Enter amount: The total annual payroll of the business in whole dollars.

BusinessInformation_AnnualGrossReceiptsA.tu: Enter amount: The total annual gross sales or receipts.

BusinessInformation_ForeignGrossSalesAmo.tu: Enter amount: The estimated annual foreign gross sales.

BusinessInformation_EmployeeCount_A.tu: Enter number: The number of employees.

UnderlyingPolicy_Automobile_PolicyExpira.tu: Enter date: The expiration date of the underlying automobile policy. (MM/DD/YYYY)

Vehicle_CombinedSingleLimit_EachAccident.tu: Enter limit: The vehicle combined single limit liability each accident amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying automobile policy.

Vehicle_BodilyInjury_PerAccidentLimitAmo.tu: Enter limit: The vehicle policy, bodily injury per accident limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying automobile policy.

UnderlyingPolicy_Automobile_PropertyDama.tu: Enter amount: The property damage premium amount on the underlying automobile policy.

CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_Questio.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates defense costs are within aggregate limits.
Check the box (if applicable): Indicates defense costs a separate limit?
Check the box (if applicable): Indicates defense costs are unlimited.

UnderlyingPolicy_GeneralLiability_FormEd.tu: Enter date: The edition date of the underlying general liability coverage form.  Policy coverage may vary depending on the edition date of the policy paper. The underlying general liability coverage forms issued by Insurances Services Office (ISO) vary if they are based on the rules of "86" or the rules of "88".

CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_Questio.tu: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Has any product, work, accident, or location been excluded, uninsured or self insured from any previous coverage?".

CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_AnyProd.tu: Enter text: An explanation as to whether any product, work, accident or location has been excluded, uninsured or self-insured from any previous coverage.

GeneralLiability_ClaimsMade_RetroactiveD.tu: Enter date: The retroactive date if the policy was issued on a Claims Made basis and there was a retroactive date.

GeneralLiability_ClaimsMade_Uninterrupte.tu: Enter date: The retroactive date shown on the applicant's first Claims Made policy.  If this is the first such policy, the date will be the same as the proposed retroactive date shown on the preceding field. If this is a renewal, it is the effective date of the first policy issued in the sequence of uninterrupted Claims Made policies.

CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_Questio.tu: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "For Claims made, was "tail" coverage purchased for any previous primary or excess policy?".

UnderlyingPolicy_GeneralLiability_TailCo.tu: Enter date: The effective date of the tail coverage.  The proposed retroactive date for the policy being applied for should not be earlier than the effective date of the tail coverage.

CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_TailCov.tu: Enter text: An explanation as to whether tail coverage was purchased for any previous primary or excess policy.

LossHistory_ClaimDate_E.tu: Enter date: The date the claim was filed.  (MM/DD/YYYY)

LossHistory_LineOfBusiness_E.tu: Enter text: The line of business involved in the loss (e.g. Automobile Liability, Property, General Liability).

LossHistory_OccurrenceDescription_E.tu: Enter text: A brief description of the loss.

LossHistory_PaidAmount_E.tu: Enter amount: The amount that has been paid on this claim to date.

LossHistory_ReservedAmount_E.tu: Enter amount: The reserve amount the previous carrier is holding open for this claim.

LossHistory_ClaimDate_F.tu: Enter date: The date the claim was filed.  (MM/DD/YYYY)

LossHistory_LineOfBusiness_F.tu: Enter text: The line of business involved in the loss (e.g. Automobile Liability, Property, General Liability).

LossHistory_OccurrenceDescription_F.tu: Enter text: A brief description of the loss.

LossHistory_PaidAmount_F.tu: Enter amount: The amount that has been paid on this claim to date.

LossHistory_ReservedAmount_F.tu: Enter amount: The reserve amount the previous carrier is holding open for this claim.

LossHistory_NoPriorLossesIndicator_A.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates there are no prior losses or occurrences that may give rise to claims for the mandated number of years. As used here, also indicates there were no claims exceeding $10,000.

CareCustodyAndControl_Location_ProducerI.tu: Enter number: The producer assigned number for the location if applicable to the ACORD 125.

CareCustodyAndControl_Property_RealIndic.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the property in the care, custody and control of the insured is real property.

CareCustodyAndControl_Property_PersonalI.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the property in the care, custody and control of the insured is personal property.

CareCustodyAndControl_Property_ValueAmou.tu: Enter amount: The value of the entire building, not just the portion occupied, for real property or the value of the personal property.

CareCustodyAndControl_InsuredLiability_H.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the insured is held harmless in the lease.
Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the insured has a waiver of subrogation.

CareCustodyAndControl_InsuredLiability_I.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the insured is a named insured on the fire policy.

CareCustodyAndControl_InsuredLiability_O.tu: Enter text: The description of the insured's liability for the described premises when other than those listed.

CareCustodyAndControl_Location_OccupiedA.tu: Enter number: The total square footage of the premises occupied by the applicant.

CareCustodyAndControl_Property_PropertyD.tu: Enter text: The description of the building occupancy or of the property held by the insured in his care, custody and control.

NamedInsured_Initials_A.tu: Initial here: The named insured's initials. As used here, applicable in Louisiana.
